title: Moderation Commands
cmds: history @user — view a member's case history
case <id> — view a single case (alias: historyview)
historyremoveall @user — wipe a member's case history
reason <id> <text> — update an existing case reason
timeoutlist — list everyone currently timed out
talk @user / untalk @user — let a member talk again / silence them in THIS channel only
purgebots [count] — delete recent messages sent by bots
purgecontains <text> — delete recent messages containing that text
purgeimages [count] — delete recent messages that have images or files
purgelinks [count] — delete recent messages that contain links
bc — clear the bot's own recent messages in this channel
cs — clear the snipe / editsnipe / reactionsnipe cache for this channel
handle [#channel] — auto-clean a channel: wipe text messages, or kick everyone who joins a voice channel
clearreactions <messageId> — remove all reactions from a message (aliases: removereactions, cr)
announce [#channel] <message> — post an announcement card (alias: announcement)
newaccounts [count] — list members with the newest Discord accounts (alias: newaccs)
vcmute / vcunmute @user — server mute/unmute in voice (aliases: voicemute, vmute)
vcdeafen / vcundeafen @user — server deafen/undeafen in voice (aliases: deafen, undeafen)
delete <messageId> — delete a message by ID (aliases: delmsg, delmessage)
banreason <userId> — show why a user was banned
pingrole <@role> — ping a role, even non-mentionable ones
messageid — get the ID of a message (alias: msgid)
untalk — silence a member in the current channel only

title: Fun Commands
cmds: gwend [messageId] — end a running giveaway now (alias: gend)
blacktea — start a blacktea game (alias: bt)
blacktea end — stop the running game in this channel
games — list every playable game (aliases: gameslist, minigames)
guessthebrainrot — guess the Italian brainrot characters (alias: gtb)
guesstheflag — guess the country from its flag (alias: gtf)
guessthecelebrity — guess the famous person (aliases: gtc, guesscelebrity)
hangman — single-player hangman, guess the word
guessnumber — guess my number 1-100 (aliases: numberguess, gn)
scramble — unscramble the word (aliases: wordscramble, unscramble)
caption <text> — make a white caption image, or reply to a message (aliases: media, mediacaption)
quote — reply to a message to turn it into a quote image (or random quote)
agify <name> — guess a name's age (alias: guessage)
genderize <name> — guess a name's gender (alias: guessgender)
nationalize <name> — guess a name's nationality (alias: guessnationality)
wheel opt1, opt2, opt3 — spin a wheel of options (alias: spin)
gamertag — generate a random gamertag (aliases: username, nickgen)
card — draw a random playing card (alias: drawcard)
magicconch — ask the magic conch (alias: conch)
motivate — a motivational quote (aliases: inspire, motivation)
convo — a conversation starter (aliases: conversation, topicstarter)
fakeword — invent a fake word (alias: gibberish)
uwulock @user — force a user's messages to be uwuified (Manage Messages)
blush / pout / smug / wave / dance / cry / smile / happy (solo)
gend — end a running giveaway now (alias: gwend)
media — set a channel to media-only

title: Economy & Activity
cmds: activitylb — top posters by total messages (aliases: alb, msglb)

title: Image Filters
cmds: -# Apply an effect to a user's avatar — defaults to you, or @mention someone.
jailimg [@user] — put their avatar behind bars
ad [@user] — turn the avatar into an ad

title: Text & Encoding
cmds: unbinary <binary> — convert binary back to text (alias: frombinary)
morse <text> — convert text to morse code
unmorse <code> — convert morse back to text (alias: demorse)
upsidedown <text> — flip text upside down (alias: fliptext)
tiny <text> — sᴍᴀʟʟ ᴄᴀᴘs text (aliases: tinytext, smallcaps)
cursive <text> — 𝓯𝓪𝓷𝓬𝔂 script text (aliases: fancy, script)
italictext <text> — 𝘪𝘵𝘢𝘭𝘪𝘤 unicode text (aliases: italic, italics)
count <text> — count characters, words & lines (aliases: charcount, wordcount)
password [length] — DM you a random password (aliases: genpassword, pass)
randomnumber <min> <max> — random number in a range (aliases: rng, randint)
calc <expression> — evaluate a math expression (aliases: math, calculate)
spaceout <text> — s p a c e d text (aliases: spacetext, space)
hexrgb <#hex> — convert hex to RGB (alias: hextorgb)
rgbhex <r> <g> <b> — convert RGB to hex (alias: rgbtohex)
codeblock <text> — wrap text in a code block (alias: code)
pirate <text> — talk like a pirate (alias: piratify)
prime <n> — check if a number is prime (alias: isprime)
fib <n> — first n Fibonacci numbers (alias: fibonacci)
roman <n> — number to Roman numerals (alias: toroman)
unroman <numeral> — Roman numerals to a number (alias: fromroman)
average <nums> — average of numbers (aliases: avg, mean)
percent <a> <b> — what % a is of b (alias: percentage)
cowsay <text> — ascii cow says your text
uuid — generate a random UUID (alias: guid)
nato <text> — spell in the NATO phonetic alphabet
reversewords <text> — reverse the word order (alias: rwords)
digitsum <n> — sum a number's digits (alias: sumdigits)
iseven / isodd <n> — even/odd check (aliases: even, odd)

title: Lookups & Search
cmds: pokemon <name|number> — look up a Pokémon (aliases: pokedex, dex)
country <name> — country info: capital, population, currency…
cocktail [name] — a cocktail recipe, or random (alias: drink)
meal [name] — a food recipe, or random (aliases: recipe, food)
xkcd [number] — a random (or specific) xkcd comic
httpcat <code> — the HTTP status code as a cat image (alias: httpstatus)
snowflake <id> — decode the creation date of any Discord ID (alias: whenmade)
qr <text|url> — generate a QR code (alias: qrcode)
github <username> — look up a GitHub user (alias: gh)
githubrepo <owner/repo> — look up a repo (aliases: ghrepo, repo)
npm <package> — look up an npm package
pypi <package> — look up a PyPI package
randomcolor — generate a random color + swatch (alias: rcolor)

title: Utility Commands
cmds: whois [@user | id | username] — look up info on any user (even non-members)
serveravatar [@user] — show a user's server-specific avatar (alias: sav)
channelperms [#channel] — show a channel's permission overwrites (alias: chperms)
clearnames @user — clear a member's stored name history
qr <text|url> — generate a QR code (alias: qrcode)
id [@user] — get a user's ID (alias: userid)
serverid — get the server ID (alias: guildid)
emojiid <:emoji:> — get a custom emoji's ID + image URL (alias: emojiurl)
boostlevel — server boost tier, count & boosters (aliases: boosttier, boostinfo)
botcount — humans vs bots breakdown (alias: humancount)
invite — get the bot's invite link (aliases: invitebot, addbot)
channels — count channels by type (alias: channellist)
serverbanner — show the server banner (alias: guildbanner)
timer <duration> — start a countdown timer, max 1h (alias: countdown)
serverage — how old the server is (alias: guildage)
accountage [@user] — how old an account is (alias: accage)
joinposition [@user] — a member's join rank (aliases: joinpos, joinrank)
emoji <name|:emoji:> — show a server emoji large (aliases: showemoji, bigemoji)
randommember [@role] — pick a random member, optionally from a role (aliases: randomuser, pickwinner, raffle)
shorten <url> — shorten a long URL (alias: shorturl)
screenshot <url> — screenshot a webpage (aliases: webshot, ss)
oldestmembers [count] — earliest members to join (alias: firstmembers)
splash — show the server invite splash (alias: serversplash)
serverowner — show who owns the server
toprole [@user] — a member's highest role (alias: highestrole)
rolecount — number of roles in the server
joinedat [@user] — when a member joined (alias: joindate)
createdat [@user] — when an account was created (alias: createdate)
showtopic [#channel] — show a channel's topic (aliases: channeltopic, gettopic)
roleposition <@role> — a role's position in the list (alias: rolepos)
epoch — current unix + Discord time (aliases: unixtime, now)
features — list the server's special features
discordstatus — current Discord platform status (alias: dstatus)
getnick [@user] — show a member's nickname/display name

title: Embeds & Messages
cmds: embedbuilder — create a new named embed (alias: eb)
eb edit <name> — open builder to edit a saved embed
embed list — list all saved embeds
embed edit <name> — open builder to edit a saved embed
embed resend <name> — resend a saved embed to this channel
embed delete <name> — delete a saved embed
Buttons: Embed, Footer, Author, Add Field, Rename
Buttons: Set Channel, Ping Role, Send & Save, Clear Fields, Reset All
Each system below supports either a plain-text message or a saved embed.
— Vanity Gate (auto-role when vanity is in custom status) —
vanitygate embed <name> — use a saved embed instead
vanitygate scan — apply gate to currently-online members
— Booster Message (when someone boosts) — (aliases: boost, bm) —
— Badge (when someone equips the server tag) —

title: Sticky Messages
cmds: sm <text> — stick a message in the current channel
sm #channel <text> — stick in a specific channel
sm list — list every sticky in this server
-# Once stuck, the bot deletes its previous post and resends after every user message so it stays at the bottom.
sticky — pin a sticky message that stays at the bottom of a channel

title: Auto-React (owner only)
cmds: The bot auto-reacts to a chosen user with a chosen emoji on every message they send.
react set @user — change which user to react to

title: Welcome Commands
cmds: welcome channel #channel — set the welcome channel
welcome test — send a test welcome message
welcomebuilder — open interactive welcome template editor (alias: wb)
welcomebuilder preview — preview the current template
welcomebuilder reset — restore the default welcome message
leave channel #channel — set the goodbye channel
leave message <text> — set the goodbye text
leave test / leave view / leave disable
poj add #channel — ghost-ping new members in a channel (up to 3)
poj remove #channel / poj list — manage ping-on-join channels

title: Fake Permissions Commands
cmds: Valid perms: administrator, manage_messages, moderate_members, manage_nicknames, manage_roles, ban_members, kick_members

title: Settings Commands
cmds: logsetup — split logs into a "depend" category (one channel per type)
customize avatar/banner/bio — change the bot's look in this server only (owner / co-owner / antinuke admin)
autorole add <@role | ID | name> — give a role to every new member
autorole remove <@role | ID | name> — stop autoroling that role
pulse setchannel #channel — auto-post a daily activity digest
pulse disable — turn off daily pulse
starboard channel #channel / threshold <n> / emoji <emoji> / disable — repost ⭐'d messages
buttonrole <@role> [@role2 …] [| text] — post a self-assign button panel
reposter on/off — fix TikTok/X/Instagram/Reddit links with working embeds
bumpreminder channel #ch / message / thankyou / disable — DISBOARD bump reminders
prefix self <symbol> — set YOUR personal prefix (works in every server)
wordstats track <word> / <word> / list / leaderboard <word> — word tracking
-# Booster Message, Badge, and Vanity Gate are in the **Embeds & Messages** category.

title: Suggestions Commands
cmds: suggest set #channel — pick where suggestions get posted (Manage Channels)

title: Anti-Nuke Commands
cmds: an config — open the antinuke configuration panel
an whitelist @user — add or remove a user from the whitelist
an whitelist list — list whitelisted users
an bot @bot — add or remove a bot from the bot whitelist
an bot list — list whitelisted bots
an admin @user — add or remove an antinuke admin (owner/co-owner)
an admin list — list all antinuke admins
an co @user — add or remove a co-owner (server owner only)
an co list — list all co-owners

title: Booster Role Commands
cmds: boosterrole create <#hex | color name | random> [name] — create your custom booster role (alias: br)
boosterrole color <#hex | color name | random> — change your role color
boosterrole name <name> — change your role name
boosterrole icon <emoji|url|none> — set the role icon (Boost Lv 2+)
boosterrole share @user — share your role with someone
boosterrole unshare @user — revoke a shared role
boosterrole shared — list who you've shared with
boosterrole delete — delete your booster role

title: Role Commands
cmds: r @user <role> — add or remove a role (auto-toggle)
r create <name> (alias: r make) — create a new role
r rename <role> <new name> — rename a role
r color <role> <#hex | name | random | reset> — change a role color
r icon <role> <emoji | default> — set or clear a role icon (requires boost lvl 2)
r restore @user — restore roles after leave/ban (alias: restore, rolerestore)
r humans @role — give role to every human (alias: rolehumans)
r bots @role — give role to every bot (alias: rolebots)
rolebots — give a role to every bot
rolehumans — give a role to every human member

title: Filter & Automod
cmds: filter wordmigrate — push filtered words into native Discord AutoMod
disablecommand <cmd> [#ch/@role] — disable server-wide, in a channel, or for a role
enablecommand <cmd> [#ch/@role] — re-enable globally, in a channel, or grant a role-override (lets that role bypass a server-wide disable)
disablecommandlist / cmdlist — view all disabled commands and role overrides

title: Responders & Commands
cmds: reaction add <emoji> <trigger> — bot auto-reacts to messages containing the trigger
reaction remove <trigger> — remove all reactions for a trigger
reaction remove <emoji> <trigger> — remove just one emoji
reaction list — view all reaction triggers
tags add <name> <response> — create a tag (then `,<name>` to use it)
tags edit / remove / rename / list / random / author <name> / reset
alias removeall <command> — remove every alias for a command
alias view <alias> — see what an alias maps to

title: VoiceMaster Commands
cmds: vmsetup — set up VoiceMaster (configure menu: toggle features + pick the private-VC category)
vm setup — set up VoiceMaster (configure menu) — same as vmsetup
vm name <name> — rename your voice channel
vm limit <0-99> — set your channel user limit (0 = unlimited)
vm lock — lock your channel so no one new can join
vm transfer @user — hand channel ownership to another member
vm claim — claim a channel whose owner has left
vm category <id or name> — set the category new public VCs are created under
vm reset — delete all VoiceMaster channels and start over (admin)
setlb — set this channel as the VC leaderboard
setlb reset — wipe all VC time data
setlb resetuser @user — wipe one member's VC time
refreshguide — re-post or refresh the VC guide panel
recap #channel — set where VC session recaps are posted (on/off/reset)
synchemojis — re-sync the VoiceMaster button emojis
vc lock / unlock — secure or open your channel
vc ban @user — reject a member from your channel
vc unban @user — allow a rejected member back
vc permit @user — permit a user or role
vc stfu @user — server-mute a member in your channel
vc unmute @user — unmute a member in your channel
vc transfer @user — hand ownership to another member
vc claim — claim a channel whose owner has left
vc limit <n> — set the user limit (0 = unlimited)
d @user — disconnect a member from their voice channel
massmove #vc — move everyone from your VC to another

title: Invites Commands
cmds: invites [@user] — show how many people a user has invited
invites lb — show the invite leaderboard (one-off)
invites leaderboard #channel — set a live-updating invite leaderboard channel (Admin)

title: Music Commands
cmds: play <song name or URL> — play a song from SoundCloud (alias: p)
queue — show the current queue (alias: q)
skip / next — skip the current song
stop / disconnect / leave — stop and leave the VC
clearqueue — remove all upcoming tracks (alias: cq)
lyrics [song] — fetch lyrics (uses current song if no arg)
seek <seconds> — jump to position in the song
remove <position> — remove a track from the queue
previous / prev / back — go back to the previous track

title: Tickets
cmds: ticket addbutton <label> | <emoji> | <colour> — add a panel button
ticket buttons / removebutton <n> / clearbuttons — manage buttons
ticket panel — post the ticket panel
ticket open — open a ticket via command
ticket close — close the current ticket
ticket add @user — add a user to the ticket
ticket remove @user — remove a user from the ticket
ticket transcript — save a transcript of the channel

title: Server Stats
cmds: stats — server overview (members, channels, roles, boosts)
activity — top 10 channels by message count (last 7d)
channelstats [#channel] — top posters in the last 100 messages
rolemembers @role — list members with that role
inactive [days] — list members in the server for N+ days

title: Misc Utility
cmds: uptime — how long the bot has been running
botinfo — uptime, members, guilds, lines, RAM, CPU (alias: bi)
steal <emoji> [name] — copy an emoji here; or reply to a sticker to steal it (aliases: addemoji, stealemoji)
extractemotes — export all server emojis as image files
sticker steal [name] — reply to a sticker to copy it here
sticker remove [name] / sticker rename <new name> / sticker list
inviteinfo <code> — look up any Discord invite
img <search> — search the web for an image (alias: image)
time <country> — current time for a country or city
coinflips <n> — flip up to 100 coins at once (alias: multiflip)

title: Other Commands
cmds: -# Auto-detected from the bot so nothing is missing.
aesthetic — convert text to ａｅｓｔｈｅｔｉｃ full-width spacing
autoresponder — create auto-replies to trigger phrases (alias: ar)
banlist — list every banned user (alias of bans)
boosterlist — list everyone currently boosting the server
botstatus — owner: set the bot's status/activity (alias: bstatus)
buttonroles — list the button-role panels in this server
disablecmd — disable a command in a channel (alias of disable)
disabledcmds — list commands disabled in this server
enablecmd — re-enable a disabled command (alias of enable)
extractemojis — pull every custom emoji out of a message (alias: extractemotes)
forcenick — lock a member's nickname so it can't be changed (alias: fn)
forcnicklist — list members with a forced nickname
gallery — set a channel to image/media-only (gallery mode)
google — search Google and return the top results
love — check the love compatibility between two users
modhistory — view a moderator's action history
namehistory — view a member's past names/nicknames
purge — bulk-delete messages with filters (alias of clear)
removereactionrole — remove a reaction role from a message
sbanner — show a user's server banner
stickers — list every custom sticker in the server
stickymessage — set/clear a sticky message for a channel
stickymsg — set/clear a sticky message for a channel
stripstaff — remove every staff/dangerous role from a member
timezone — show or set a user's timezone (alias: tz)
vcrecap — show a recap of recent voice-channel activity
